CREATE TABLE remote_data (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM remote_data WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM remote_data);
SELECT r.id, r.value, a.description FROM remote_data r JOIN additional_data a ON r.id = a.id;
SELECT * FROM remote_data WHERE value LIKE 'first%' OR id IN (SELECT id FROM additional_data WHERE description = 'desc1');
EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'SELECT rnext FROM remote_data WHERE id = 1';
EXECUTE 'rexecute' USING (SELECT * FROM remote_data WHERE id < 3);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_results AS SELECT * FROM remote_data;
INSERT INTO temp_results SELECT * FROM additional_data;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_results WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM remote_data UNION ALL SELECT id, description FROM additional_data) AS combined;
SELECT r.value FROM remote_data r WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_data a WHERE a.id = r.id) ORDER BY r.value DESC;
CREATE VIEW result_view AS SELECT r.value, a.description FROM remote_data r LEFT JOIN additional_data a ON r.id = a.id;
SELECT * FROM result_view WHERE value IN (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM remote_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
